testcase.name: runScenario["Create a new walk-in booking for a new guest with cash payment", "Create Booking"](1)
testcase.system-out: @walkin Scenario: Create a new walk-in booking for a new guest with cash payment # src/test/resources/features/Booking.feature:4 [CommonSteps] waiting for dashboard, current URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard [CommonSteps] dashboard detected, URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard Given I am logged in # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.iAmLoggedIn() When I navigate to bookings page # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.iNavigateToBookingsPage() [BookingSteps] Excel loaded: WalkIn_Guest -> {ROOMS=1, ZIP=10001, LAST NAME=Williams, BOOKING TYPE=Walk In, FIRST NAME=Jully, ADDRESS=123 Main Street, ADULTS=1, SCENARIO=Walk-In Booking, NIGHTS=1, EMAIL=jully.williams@example.com, KIDS=0, MOBILE=5551234567} [BookingSteps] checkin_date already filled: 04/23/2026 [BookingSteps] checkout_date already filled: 04/24/2026 [BookingSteps] Search form: type=Walk In rooms=1 nights=1 [BookingSteps] Search clicked [BookingSteps] Search results ready [BookingSteps] Clicked room_types button [BookingSteps] Select2 #country-dropdown = 'United States' (value=019542f8-270a-a8b2-aff5-475e2036cf10) [BookingSteps] Select2 #state-dropdown = 'Alaska' (value=01954301-0d52-9ea8-8e64-0c82fa92d2a3) [BookingSteps] Select2 #city-dropdown = 'Akutan' (value=019542f2-1c4b-bb63-ee73-457a3dfeacdc) [BookingSteps] Guest filled: Jully Williams [BookingSteps] Clicked Next button [BookingSteps] Cash selected [BookingSteps] Booking confirmed And I create a new booking with guest details # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.iCreateANewBookingWithGuestDetails() [BookingSteps] Booking created: https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/booking/details/019db94a-86fc-afb6-c68a-568833168fc2 Then the booking should be created successfully # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.theBookingShouldBeCreatedSuccessfully()
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. Apr 23, 2026 1:12:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 23, 2026 1:12:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. ERROR StatusLogger Log4j2 could not find a logging implementation. Please add log4j-core to the classpath. Using SimpleLogger to log to the console...

testcase.name: runScenario["Create a reservation booking for 5 rooms and 6 nights with cash payment", "Create Booking"](2)
testcase.system-out: @reservation Scenario: Create a reservation booking for 5 rooms and 6 nights with cash payment # src/test/resources/features/Booking.feature:11 [CommonSteps] waiting for dashboard, current URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard [CommonSteps] dashboard detected, URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard Given I am logged in # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.iAmLoggedIn() When I navigate to bookings page # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.iNavigateToBookingsPage() [BookingSteps] Excel loaded: Reservation_Guest -> {ROOMS=5, ZIP=90210, LAST NAME=Disuza, BOOKING TYPE=Reservation, FIRST NAME=Kelvin, ADDRESS=456 Ocean Avenue, ADULTS=5, SCENARIO=Reservation Booking, NIGHTS=6, EMAIL=kelvin.disuza@example.com, KIDS=0, MOBILE=5559876543} [BookingSteps] checkin_date already filled: 04/23/2026 [BookingSteps] checkout_date already filled: 04/24/2026 [BookingSteps] Search form: type=Reservation rooms=5 nights=6 [BookingSteps] Search clicked [BookingSteps] Search results ready [BookingSteps] Clicked room_types button [BookingSteps] Select2 #country-dropdown = 'United States' (value=019542f8-270a-a8b2-aff5-475e2036cf10) [BookingSteps] Select2 #state-dropdown = 'Alaska' (value=01954301-0d52-9ea8-8e64-0c82fa92d2a3) [BookingSteps] Select2 #city-dropdown = 'Akutan' (value=019542f2-1c4b-bb63-ee73-457a3dfeacdc) [BookingSteps] Guest filled: Kelvin Disuza [BookingSteps] Clicked Next button [BookingSteps] Cash selected [BookingSteps] Booking confirmed And I create a reservation booking for 5 rooms and 6 nights # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.iCreateAReservationBookingFor5RoomsAnd6Nights() [BookingSteps] Reservation booking created: https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/booking/todays/new-booking Then the reservation booking should be created successfully # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.theReservationBookingShouldBeCreatedSuccessfully()
testcase.system-err: Apr 23, 2026 1:12:48 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 23, 2026 1:12:48 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Create a walk-in booking for Non Smoking Double Beds room type with cash payment", "Create Booking"](3)
testcase.system-out: @walkin-nsdb Scenario: Create a walk-in booking for Non Smoking Double Beds room type with cash payment # src/test/resources/features/Booking.feature:18 [CommonSteps] waiting for dashboard, current URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard [CommonSteps] dashboard detected, URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard Given I am logged in # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.iAmLoggedIn() When I navigate to bookings page # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.iNavigateToBookingsPage() [BookingSteps] Excel loaded: WalkIn_NSDB_Guest -> {ZIP=30301, BOOKING TYPE=Walk In, FIRST NAME=Joyvita, ADULTS=2, EMAIL=joyvita.williams@example.com, KIDS=0, ROOMS=1, LAST NAME=Williams, ADDRESS=88 Lakeview Drive, SCENARIO=Walk-In NSDB Booking, NIGHTS=1, ROOM TYPE=Non Smoking Double Beds, MOBILE=5553219870} [BookingSteps] checkin_date already filled: 04/23/2026 [BookingSteps] checkout_date already filled: 04/24/2026 [BookingSteps] Search form: type=Walk In rooms=1 nights=1 [BookingSteps] Search clicked [BookingSteps] Search results ready [BookingSteps] Clicked NSDB heading [BookingSteps] Clicked NSDB SELECT button [BookingSteps] Modal closed [BookingSteps] NSDB room selected, guest form ready [BookingSteps] Select2 #country-dropdown = 'United States' (value=019542f8-270a-a8b2-aff5-475e2036cf10) [BookingSteps] Select2 #state-dropdown = 'Alaska' (value=01954301-0d52-9ea8-8e64-0c82fa92d2a3) [BookingSteps] Select2 #city-dropdown = 'Akutan' (value=019542f2-1c4b-bb63-ee73-457a3dfeacdc) [BookingSteps] Guest filled: Joyvita Williams [BookingSteps] Clicked Next button [BookingSteps] Cash selected [BookingSteps] Booking confirmed And I create a walk-in booking for NSDB room type # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.iCreateAWalkInBookingForNSDBRoomType() [BookingSteps] Booking created: https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/booking/details/019db94c-acd6-9d52-dc28-d97849daea11 Then the booking should be created successfully # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.theBookingShouldBeCreatedSuccessfully()
testcase.system-err: Apr 23, 2026 1:14:36 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 23, 2026 1:14:36 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Create a reservation booking for Non Smoking Double Beds room type with cash payment", "Create Booking"](4)
testcase.system-out: @reservation-nsdb Scenario: Create a reservation booking for Non Smoking Double Beds room type with cash payment # src/test/resources/features/Booking.feature:25 [CommonSteps] waiting for dashboard, current URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard [CommonSteps] dashboard detected, URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard Given I am logged in # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.iAmLoggedIn() When I navigate to bookings page # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.iNavigateToBookingsPage() [BookingSteps] Excel loaded: Reservation_NSDB_Guest -> {ZIP=77001, BOOKING TYPE=Reservation, FIRST NAME=Joyvita, ADULTS=5, EMAIL=joyvita.williams2@example.com, KIDS=1, ROOMS=4, LAST NAME=Williams, ADDRESS=22 Riverside Road, SCENARIO=Reservation NSDB Booking, NIGHTS=6, ROOM TYPE=Non Smoking Double Beds, MOBILE=5557654321} [BookingSteps] checkin_date already filled: 04/23/2026 [BookingSteps] checkout_date already filled: 04/24/2026 [BookingSteps] Search form: type=Reservation rooms=4 nights=6 [BookingSteps] Search clicked [BookingSteps] Search results ready [BookingSteps] Clicked NSDB heading [BookingSteps] Clicked NSDB SELECT button [BookingSteps] Modal closed [BookingSteps] NSDB room selected, guest form ready [BookingSteps] Select2 #country-dropdown = 'United States' (value=019542f8-270a-a8b2-aff5-475e2036cf10) [BookingSteps] Select2 #state-dropdown = 'Alaska' (value=01954301-0d52-9ea8-8e64-0c82fa92d2a3) [BookingSteps] Select2 #city-dropdown = 'Akutan' (value=019542f2-1c4b-bb63-ee73-457a3dfeacdc) [BookingSteps] Guest filled: Joyvita Williams [BookingSteps] Clicked Next button [BookingSteps] Cash selected [BookingSteps] Booking confirmed And I create a reservation booking for NSDB room type # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.iCreateAReservationBookingForNSDBRoomType() [BookingSteps] Reservation booking created: https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/booking/todays/new-booking Then the reservation booking should be created successfully # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.theReservationBookingShouldBeCreatedSuccessfully()
testcase.system-err: Apr 23, 2026 1:15:08 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 23, 2026 1:15:08 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Check in a guest", "Check In Guest"](5)
testcase.system-out:
@checkin Scenario: Check in a guest # src/test/resources/features/CheckIn.feature:4 [CommonSteps] waiting for dashboard, current URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard [CommonSteps] dashboard detected, URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard Given I am logged in # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.iAmLoggedIn() When I navigate to arrivals page # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.CheckInSteps.iNavigateToArrivalsPage() ╔══════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ Arrivals page loaded ║ ║ Total guests present: 9 ║ ╚══════════════════════════════════════════╝
[CheckInSteps] ── Processing guest 1 of 9 ── [CheckInSteps] Check-in buttons remaining: 9 [CheckInSteps] Clicked Check In button for guest 1 [CheckInSteps] Clicked modal Check In button (guest 1) [CheckInSteps] Clicked next link (guest 1) [CheckInSteps] saveReceipt failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //*[@id='content'] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '14.6', java.version: '17.0.13' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: /var/folders/bt/fnhvdc_n35x...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53764}, goog:processID: 48581, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:53764/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 2374e1b5aebc6927f5e3486a018211b7 [CheckInSteps] Returned to arrivals page
[CheckInSteps] ── Processing guest 2 of 9 ── [CheckInSteps] Check-in buttons remaining: 8 [CheckInSteps] Clicked Check In button for guest 2 [CheckInSteps] Clicked modal Check In button (guest 2) [CheckInSteps] Clicked next link (guest 2) [CheckInSteps] saveReceipt failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //*[@id='content'] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '14.6', java.version: '17.0.13' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: /var/folders/bt/fnhvdc_n35x...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53764}, goog:processID: 48581, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:53764/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 2374e1b5aebc6927f5e3486a018211b7 [CheckInSteps] Returned to arrivals page
[CheckInSteps] ── Processing guest 3 of 9 ── [CheckInSteps] Check-in buttons remaining: 7 [CheckInSteps] Clicked Check In button for guest 3 [CheckInSteps] Clicked modal Check In button (guest 3) [CheckInSteps] Clicked next link (guest 3) [CheckInSteps] saveReceipt failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //*[@id='content'] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '14.6', java.version: '17.0.13' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: /var/folders/bt/fnhvdc_n35x...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53764}, goog:processID: 48581, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:53764/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 2374e1b5aebc6927f5e3486a018211b7 [CheckInSteps] Returned to arrivals page

[CheckInSteps] ✓ All 9 guests checked in And I select a booking and check in # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.CheckInSteps.iSelectABookingAndCheckIn() [CheckInSteps] Check-in scenario completed successfully Then the guest should be checked in successfully # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.CheckInSteps.theGuestShouldBeCheckedInSuccessfully()
testcase.system-err: Apr 23, 2026 1:16:59 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 23, 2026 1:16:59 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Successful login with valid credentials", "Login to HX PMS"](6)
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Successful login with valid credentials # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:11 Given I am on the login page # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.iAmOnTheLoginPage() When I enter username "webdev" and password "1234" # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.iEnterUsernameAndPassword(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [LoginSteps] waiting for dashboard, current URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard [LoginSteps] dashboard detected, URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard And I click the login button # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.iClickTheLoginButton() [LoginSteps] waiting for dashboard, current URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard [LoginSteps] dashboard detected, URL=https://demo.hotelxplore.com/frontdesk/dashboard, title=Hotel Xplore - Dashboard Then I should be logged in successfully # com.hxpms.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.iShouldBeLoggedInSuccessfully()
testcase.system-err: Apr 23, 2026 1:22:52 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 23, 2026 1:22:52 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
